actionUnits.condition: MonoBehaviour (scene id: 127885130) uses script GUID 9cde80f2fe6fe6e47b57eb962721c06f (class OtherLaneController). Plane (1) has a MeshCollider (id: 127885132) set as IsTrigger=1 and no Rigidbody, so OnTriggerEnter requires another Rigidbody Collider with tag 'Ball' to enter this trigger. On trigger, after 5 seconds it checks the tag == 'Ball', reads BallSoundController.peso and pesoEnKgs from the colliding object, destroys that ball, then instantiates bolaPrefab (guid: 1be75124d3e50ad4997a90e0d8d1fe74, fileID: 424594858964415916) at aparicionBola (fileID: 165335085), sets BallSoundController fields on the new ball and calls changePeso(), then applies an impulse force via Rigidbody.AddForce.

Plane (2) has a MeshCollider (id:1620417933) with m_IsTrigger=1 and no Rigidbody. It has a MonoBehaviour OtherLaneController (id:1620417931) whose script matches guid 9cde80f2fe6fe6e47b57eb962721c06f and serialized fields aparicionBola(fileID:165335085) and bolaPrefab(guid:1be75124d3e50ad4997a90e0d8d1fe74). We want to trigger the OnTriggerEnter event by entering this trigger with a collider that has a Rigidbody, is tagged 'Ball', and has BallSoundController with fields peso(float) and pesoEnKgs(int). Expected behavior: the coroutine waits 5s, destroys the incoming Ball, then GeneraBola sets peso/pesoEnKgs on bolaPrefab's BallSoundController, calls changePeso(), instantiates bolaPrefab at aparicionBola, and applies AddForce(Vector3(1,0,0)*1.5, Impulse).
Trigger OnTriggerEnter with a collider that does NOT have tag 'Ball' to cover the false branch of the condition. Expected: after 5s, no Destroy and no GeneraBola invocation.
Manually call Mirar methods (script guid: 8817b2a8c34ba5d4d941beaf47d0be6f) to toggle canvas visibility. Expect: canvas.enabled becomes true (Mira) then false (Para).
Force re-apply weight via BallSoundController.changePeso (script guid: 8fcde7f4195eca944bfe1e2addf5338a). Expect Rigidbody.mass = 0.7 and textoPeso text updates to '7KG'.
